title: WHOOP Cycle
description: Schema for a WHOOP physiological cycle, the foundational time-window WHOOP uses to compute daily Strain. A Cycle typically lasts ~24 hours from sleep-onset and contains a Strain score, average and max heart rate, and total energy expenditure in kilojoules.

id.description: Unique identifier for the physiological cycle.

user_id.description: The WHOOP user the cycle belongs to.

created_at.description: Time the cycle was recorded in WHOOP.

updated_at.description: Last time the cycle record was updated.

end.description: ISO-8601 end of the cycle. Absent for the in-progress cycle.

score_state.description: Whether scoring has completed for the cycle.

score.description: Cycle score. Present only when score_state = SCORED.

kilojoule.description: Total energy expended over the cycle in kJ.

average_heart_rate.description: Average heart rate during the cycle (bpm).

max_heart_rate.description: Maximum heart rate during the cycle (bpm).
